name: Pumpkin Chocolate Chip Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar in a large bowl.
2. Gradually add eggs to the mixture, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in the canned pumpkin until combined.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together flour, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, pumpkin pie spice, cloves, ginger, chocolate chips, and chopped walnuts.
5. Combine the dry ingredients with the wet ingredients, stirring until just mixed.
6. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9x5 inch loaf pan.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 45-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow bread to cool on a wire rack before serving.
Glaze
1. In a small bowl, mix heavy cream and powdered sugar until smooth.
2. Spread glaze over the cooled bread.
